modal.title: Updating mimo2codex
modal.subtitle: Method: {{method}}. The server will stop automatically once the update finishes — re-launch `mimo2codex` from your terminal.
modal.doneOk: Update succeeded (exit 0). The server is shutting down — run `mimo2codex` in your terminal to start the new version.
modal.doneFail: Update failed (exit {{exitCode}}). Check the log above or retry from your terminal.
modal.skipped: No automated update path detected. Run this in your terminal:

method.git: git checkout (git pull + npm run build:all)
method.desktop: Desktop installer (download a new build to update)
